purpose: machine-readable pull exporter/importer to push executor handoff

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as read-only provenance

push_pipeline.preflight: binds the persisted base package to the live remote identity and write scope
push_pipeline.snapshot_hashes: lists the live remote comparison set for the requested scope and returns cursorable coverage proof
push_pipeline.plan_dry_run: uploads the canonical three-way plan from base, local, and live remote as an eligibility receipt only
push_pipeline.batch_apply: revalidates the live remote before every batch and again at the storage boundary before any write
push_pipeline.journal: resolves lost responses, leases, and crash ambiguity without granting a lock
push_pipeline.recover: inspects, finishes, rolls back, or blocks using journal evidence and fresh live hashes, with inspect first

session_binding.scoped_write_authority: one persisted pull base, one remote identity, one requested scope, one short-lived push session

evidence: resource keys and hashes observed during pull

required_invariants: the pull package is immutable provenance, not a live lock
dry-run is eligibility only and apply revalidates the live remote again
remote hash listing is planning evidence and never an apply lock
journal and recover inspect explain evidence without turning stale proof into authority
preflight binds the push session to the stored pull base, requested scope, and live remote identity
mutating recovery requires inspect evidence before finish or rollback
